_comment: Add this entry to the PostToolUse hooks block in ~/.dotfiles/.claude/settings.json, inside the existing 'Read' matcher block. The read-tracker.sh entry already present handles edit-without-read enforcement — this hook is additive and independent.
_integration_note: In the actual settings.json, the matcher 'Read' block already exists with read-tracker.sh. Add the read-audit.sh entry as a second hook in that same block's 'hooks' array, or add a new matcher block. Both patterns work — Claude Code runs all matching hooks in sequence.
